perturbation.original_text: January 22, 2020 (Date) ABP TRUST /s/ Adam D. Portnoy (Signature) Adam D. Portnoy, President (Name/Title) ADAM D. PORTNOY /s/ Adam D. Portnoy (Signature)
perturbation.changed_text: January 22, 2020 (Date) ABP TRUST /s/ Adam D. Portnoy (Signature) Adam D. Portnoy, President (Name/Title)
perturbation.explanation: By removing the second signature and the corresponding name, 'ADAM D. PORTNOY /s/ Adam D. Portnoy (Signature)', the agreement lacks clarity regarding who all are part of the Joint Filing Agreement. The agreement now shows only ABP Trust agreeing, while the original shows both ABP Trust and Adam D. Portnoy agreeing. This omission can lead to disputes about the enforcement of the agreement for Adam D. Portnoy individually, as his commitment is ambiguously represented. It creates an in-text contradiction as the introductory sentence states 'The undersigned hereby agree', and yet only one signatory is definitively listed.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The undersigned hereby agree that the Schedule 13G/A with respect to the shares of Class A Common Stock, $0.001 par value per share, of The RMR Group Inc., dated as of December 31, 2019, is filed on behalf of each of us.
perturbation.justification: The original text included two signatures, indicating that both ABP Trust and Adam D. Portnoy agreed to the terms. The changed text removes Adam D. Portnoy's signature, suggesting only ABP Trust is a party to the agreement. This directly contradicts the statement in the 'Contradicted Text' that 'The undersigned hereby agree that the Schedule 13G/A...is filed on behalf of each of us,' because the 'us' is no longer clearly defined, creating a contradiction about who is bound by the agreement.
